basic_details.job_title: ICAR NIPB Project Assistant I Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: ICAR National Institute for Plant Biotechnology (ICAR NIPB)
basic_details.short_information: The ICAR National Institute for Plant Biotechnology (ICAR NIPB) has officially announced the Project Assistant I Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening under Advt. No. 2001-3129/381607/Project Assistant-I. The detailed notification has been published on the official ICAR NIPB website. Candidates with a maximum age of 50 years and holding a B.Sc. or Graduation in Biological Science, Biology-related subjects, or any relevant discipline are eligible to attend the walk-in interview on 20-07-2026. Direct links to download the official notification and walk-in details are shared below.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc/ graduation passed in biological science/ biology related subjects or any relevant subject
qualification.details: B.Sc/ graduation passed in biological science/ biology related subjects or any relevant subject.

rows.icar_national_institute_for_plant_biotec: B.Sc/ graduation passed in biological science/ biology related subjects or any relevant subject

content_sections.heading: ICAR NIPB Project Assistant I Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the ICAR NIPB Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download ICAR-NIPB Project Assistant I Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ICAR NIPB Project Assistant I Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: B.Sc/ graduation passed in biological science/ biology related subjects or any relevant subject.

content_sections.heading: ICAR-NIPB Project Assistant I Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for ICAR-NIPB Project Assistant-I Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: ICAR NIPB Project Assistant I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for the Project Assistant-I post?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Project Assistant-I post at ICAR-NIPB is scheduled for 20th July 2026. Candidates should ensure they are present at the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant-I position?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification for the Project Assistant-I post is a B.Sc degree or graduation in biological science, biology-related subjects, or any relevant subject.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Assistant-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Project Assistant-I post is 50 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant-I role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Assistant-I position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The mode of application for this recruitment is through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview in person with all required documents.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are available for the Project Assistant-I post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Assistant-I post at ICAR-NIPB.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the ICAR-NIPB office in New Delhi, Delhi, with the pincode 110012.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The job for the Project Assistant-I post is contractual in nature.
